decision.summary: No new action: reconciliation is clean, but the snapshot at day rollover still shows the exhausted April 23 daily board rather than a fresh tradable April 24 slate.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 78294.19, with price back near the top of the short-term range, but the only live active thesis position is still the weekly 80k reach around 48%, while the old weekly 72k dip remains a discarded legacy position. At this midnight rollover snapshot, the daily board is still the stale April 23 slate: the relevant downside dailies are already effectively dead, the nearest upside daily shown is still 79k on April 23 around 18.5%, and there is no fresh April 24 same-day board to evaluate yet. Under the playbook, there is no reason to force a new trade off exhausted daily markets from the previous session. The weekly 80k reach is not near the 90-95% take-profit zone and does not require management. The next weekly upside strike, 82k reach, is only about 13% and remains too weak to justify a second weekly entry. The correct action is to hold the live weekly 80k reach and wait for a clean April 24 daily slate before considering any new position.
